_description: Cursor Platform Quality Hooks for RenderDoc/RDC GPU Debug Framework
_notes: 本文件作为hooks配置的补充说明，实际hooks配置以 .cursor/settings.json 为准
settings.json 中定义了 preToolUse, postToolUse, preCommit, stop 等事件的hooks
本文件保留环境变量说明和脚本路径参考

_environment_variables.CURSOR_WRITE_PATH: Path to file being written (set by Cursor IDE)
_environment_variables.CURSOR_SESSION_ID: Current session ID (optional, falls back to .current_session marker)
_environment_variables.DEBUGGER_PLATFORM_TOOLS_ROOT: Path to platform tools root (used by MCP server)
